sqlText: PulsePlay AI playground · multi-BI host Ready BI + AI AI Insights Ask Pulse BI Viz Show history Bind User Identity to enable per-user retrieval. Rank the key drivers behind the current result and explain the largest contributors. Narrative Chart Table Sql WITH category_contrib AS ( SELECT category, sub_category, SUM(sales) AS total_sales, SUM(profit) AS total_profit FROM `workspace`.`databrickspractice`.`vw_genie_sales_performance` WHERE category IS NOT NULL AND sub_category IS NOT NULL GROUP BY category, sub_category ) SELECT category, sub_category, total_sales, total_profit, RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY total_sales DESC ) AS sales_rank, RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY total_profit DESC ) AS profit_rank FROM category_contrib ORDER BY total_sales DESC, total_profit DESC; Helpful? 👍 👎 ⎘ Copy answer ✦ TRY ASKING Rank key drivers Summarize for leadership Run what-if Press Enter to send.
